datasets.name: 98355c6b
datasets.displayName: NHS Supplier Contracts with Dates and Locations
queryLines:
select 
  c.contract_type, 
  e.contract_id,
  e.supplier_id, 
  e.postcode, 
  e.issue_date, 
  e.closing_date,
  p.quantity,
  p.quoted_cost,
  p.actual_cost,
  p.cost_overrun,
  s.supplier_name
from workspace.nhs.nhs_contracts_type as c
join workspace.nhs.nhs_contracts as e
  on c.contract_type = e.contract_type
join workspace.default.nhs_costs as p
  on e.contract_id = p.contract_id
join workspace.default.nhs_suppliers as s
  on e.supplier_id = s.supplier_id

datasets.name: 4e916a5d
queryLines:
select 
  c.contract_type, 
  e.contract_id,
  e.supplier_id, 
  e.postcode, 
  e.issue_date, 
  e.closing_date,
  p.quantity,
  p.quoted_cost,
  p.actual_cost,
  p.cost_overrun,
  s.supplier_name,
  date_format(e.closing_date, 'MMMM') as closing_month
from workspace.nhs.nhs_contracts_type as c
join workspace.nhs.nhs_contracts as e
  on c.contract_type = e.contract_type
join workspace.default.nhs_costs as p
  on e.contract_id = p.contract_id
join workspace.default.nhs_suppliers as s
  on e.supplier_id = s.supplier_id

datasets.name: 298c461a
queryLines:
select 
  c.contract_type, 
  e.contract_id,
  e.supplier_id, 
  e.postcode, 
  e.issue_date, 
  e.closing_date,
  p.quantity,
  p.quoted_cost,
  p.actual_cost,
  p.cost_overrun,
  s.supplier_name,

  -- Month name
  date_format(e.closing_date, 'MMMM') as closing_month,

  -- Financial quarter (UK FY: Apr–Mar)
  case 
    when month(e.closing_date) between 4 and 6 then 'Q1'
    when month(e.closing_date) between 7 and 9 then 'Q2'
    when month(e.closing_date) between 10 and 12 then 'Q3'
    when month(e.closing_date) between 1 and 3 then 'Q4'
  end as closing_financial_quarter

from workspace.nhs.nhs_contracts_type as c
join workspace.nhs.nhs_contracts as e
  on c.contract_type = e.contract_type
join workspace.default.nhs_costs as p
  on e.contract_id = p.contract_id
join workspace.default.nhs_suppliers as s
  on e.supplier_id = s.supplier_id;

datasets.name: 80658ab0
queryLines:
select 
  c.Contract_ID,
  c.contract_type,
  c.Predicted,
  c.Actual,
  c.quoted_cost,
  c.actual_cost,
  c.Predicted_Probability as cost_predicted_prob,
  c.predicted_max_lead_cost,
  c.actual_cost - c.predicted_max_lead_cost as cost_error,
  t.Predicted_Probability as time_predicted_prob,
  t.predicted_max_lead_time,
  t.quoted_lead_days,
  t.actual_lead_days,
  t.actual_lead_days - t.predicted_max_lead_time as time_error,
  t.closing_date_month,

  

case 
  when t.closing_date_month in ("January", "February", "March") then 'Q4'
  when t.closing_date_month in ("April", "May", "June") then 'Q1'
  when t.closing_date_month in ("July", "August", "September") then 'Q2'
  when t.closing_date_month in ("October", "November", "December") then 'Q3'
end as closing_financial_quarter,

  e.contract_id,
  s.supplier_name,

  case 
  when cost_predicted_prob < 0.33 then 'Low Cost Risk'
  when cost_predicted_prob < 0.66 then 'Medium Cost Risk'
  else 'High Cost Risk'
end as cost_risk_band,

case 
  when time_predicted_prob < 0.33 then 'Low Time Risk'
  when time_predicted_prob < 0.66 then 'Medium Time Risk'
  else 'High Time Risk'
end as time_risk_band,

case 
  when cost_error <= 0 and time_error <= 0 then 'On Time & On Budget'
  when cost_error > 0 and time_error <= 0 then 'Over Budget'
  when cost_error <= 0 and time_error > 0 then 'Late'
  else 'Late & Over Budget'
end as actual_outcome



from my_catalog.bsheffield_spark.cost_lin_class_results_df as c
join my_catalog.bsheffield_spark.time_lin_class_results_df as t
  on c.Contract_ID = t.Contract_ID
join workspace.nhs.nhs_contracts as e
  on c.Contract_ID = e.contract_id
join workspace.default.nhs_suppliers as s
  on e.supplier_id = s.supplier_id

datasets.name: ea914933
datasets.displayName: Lead Cost Prediction Accuracy Within Ten Percent
queryLines:
select 
  avg(
    case 
      when abs(actual_cost - predicted_max_lead_cost) / actual_cost <= 0.10 
      then 1 else 0 
    end
  ) as cost_accuracy_within_10pct
from merge_cost_time_results
